prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
Spanish:
"Si no sembraste ayer, siembra hoy." 
(If you didn't sow yesterday, sow today.)

Note: This version captures the urgency and forward-looking spirit of the original proverb.

Arabic:
"لا يفوتك الأوان للبدء" 
(It's not too late to begin.)

Note: This translation emphasizes the encouragement to start despite past missed opportunities, which is the core message of the original proverb.
